title: Support nested SytemVerilog interface as a port connection in a module

features.name: nested interface as module port connection
features.description: Code should include a nested interface definition where one interface contains another interface instance, and that nested interface is passed as a module port connection using dot notation

features.name: parameterized nested interface as module port connection
features.description: Code should include a parameterized interface defined within another interface, connected to a module port via dot notation path to the nested interface
